name: Backrooms Escape Protocol
short_description: Backrooms Escape Protocol is a multiplayer horror game where you and your friends explore eerie backrooms, evade terrifying entities, and uncover hidden secrets. Work together to survive the endless maze and escape before it's too late!
detailed_description:
Backrooms Escape Protocol Work together with your team to explore abandoned industrial zones, navigate mysterious liminal spaces, and survive terrifying entities lurking in the shadows.

Survive the Unknown

You and your friends take on the role of scavengers sent into a series of procedurally generated Backrooms levels, each with unique environments and dangers. Your mission is to explore, collect valuable artifacts, and find an escape before time runs out. But be careful—something is always watching!

Key Features:

Co-op Multiplayer (1-8 players) – Team up with friends or go solo, but survival is never guaranteed.

Multiple Unique Levels – Explore various eerie locations, including abandoned offices, decaying factories, underground tunnels, and more.

Terrifying Entities – Face unpredictable AI-driven monsters that adapt to your movements and strategies.

Dynamic Objectives – Find hidden exits, solve environmental puzzles, and manage resources to escape each level.

More Levels, More Fear

Currently, the game features several handcrafted levels, with more planned in future updates. Each environment introduces new mechanics, threats, and challenges, ensuring that no two playthroughs feel the same.

Are you ready to enter the Backrooms Escape Protocol and uncover its dark secrets? Just remember—don’t look back.
